v1_3_2_beta.title: What's improved
features: An optional intro paragraph for your stories section
fixes: Object details like credit, source, and type now save reliably
Uploading images is more dependable — a failed upload can be retried safely, with no duplicates
Clearer messages when an image can't be uploaded, instead of a generic "check your connection"
Object handling is steadier — typed IDs are tidied automatically, and objects no longer briefly disappear after collaborative edits
Framework upgrades no longer stall when a GitHub permission is still pending
v1_3_2_beta.thanks_cta: You can help us make Telar and the compositor better by reporting any issues you find too, using the bug button
